---
title: "Clark Fork River, MT - bioassay experiment"
author: "Matthew T. Nichols"
date: "2025-02-10"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

## nutrient diffusing substrate code

```{r}
#set working directory
#setwd("/Users/matthewnichols/Desktop/NADAS/Paper/0_Data/FINAL_CODE")

```

```{r}
#load ALL libraries
library(brms)
library(lme4)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(plotly)
library(patchwork)
library(dataRetrieval)

options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores()) #run stan using multiple cores

```


```{r}
NDS <- read.csv("NDS_CHLA.csv")

nds_model_brms <- 
  brm(log(CHLA) ~ N * P + (1 + N * P | group),  
  data = NDS, family = gaussian(),
  prior = c(
    set_prior("normal(2.7, 0.5)", class = "Intercept"),
    set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "b"),
    set_prior("student_t(3, 0, 2)", class = "sd") 
  ),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99),
  warmup = 2000, iter = 4000, chains = 4
)

```

```{r}
print(nds_model_brms)
ranef(nds_model_brms)
```


```{r}
#extract coefficients
#coef_b<-coef(model_brms)
nds_coef_b<-coef(nds_model_brms)

nds_total_effects_b<-data.frame( group=as.factor(c(1:12)),
                          beta_0=nds_coef_b$group[,1,1],
                     beta_N=nds_coef_b$group[,1,2],
                     beta_P=nds_coef_b$group[,1,3],
                     beta_NP=nds_coef_b$group[,1,4])


#make another data frame of x variables
nds_bparams<- data.frame(
  N=rep(c(0,1,0,1),12),
  P=rep(c(0,0,1,1),12), 
  group=as.factor(rep(c(1:12), each = 4)))

#classify deployment and site
nds_bparams <- nds_bparams %>%
  mutate(
    Site = case_when(
      group %in% c(1, 5, 9) ~ 1,
      group %in% c(2, 6, 10) ~ 2,
      group %in% c(3, 7, 11) ~ 3,
      group %in% c(4, 8, 12) ~ 4,
    ),
    Deployment = case_when(
      group %in% 1:4 ~ 1,
      group %in% 5:8 ~ 2,
      group %in% 9:12 ~ 3,
    )
  )

#join dataframes
nds_bparams<- left_join(nds_bparams,nds_total_effects_b, by ="group")

#estimate predicted values for plotting
nds_bparams$pred<- nds_bparams$beta_0+nds_bparams$beta_N*nds_bparams$N + nds_bparams$beta_P*nds_bparams$P +
  nds_bparams$beta_NP*nds_bparams$P*nds_bparams$P* nds_bparams$N

```

```{r}
# custom labels for deployments
 deployment_labels <- c(
   "1" = "Early",
   "2" = "Mid",
   "3" = "Late"
)

#custom labels for groups (Sites)
 site_labels <- c(
   "1" = "Site 1",
   "2" = "Site 2",
   "3" = "Site 3",
   "4" = "Site 4"
)

 
nds_bparams$group <- as.factor(nds_bparams$group)


all_data <- NDS %>% mutate(group = as.factor(Deployment))
all_bparams <- nds_bparams %>% mutate(group = as.factor(Deployment))


# change group to a factor for labeling
all_data$group <- factor(all_data$group, levels = c(1:12))
all_bparams$group <- factor(all_bparams$group, levels = c(1:12))

# adjust x-axis for slight offset in P treatment
all_data$N_ax <- all_data$N + ifelse(all_data$P == 0, -0.05, 0.05)
all_bparams$N_ax <- all_bparams$N + ifelse(all_bparams$P == 0, -0.05, 0.05)
all_bparams$pred_chl <- exp(all_bparams$pred)



nds_combined <- ggplot(all_data, aes(x = N_ax, y = CHLA, color = as.factor(P))) +
  geom_point(size = 2, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_line(data = all_bparams, aes(x = N_ax, y = pred_chl, color = as.factor(P))) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = 'log10') +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), limits = c(-0.1, 1.1)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "red2", "1" = "dodgerblue4"), name = "P") +
  labs(x = "N", y = expression(Chl-a~(mg/m^2)), title = "") +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(Site),
    cols = vars(Deployment),
    labeller = labeller(Deployment = as_labeller(deployment_labels),
                        Site = as_labeller(site_labels))
  ) +
 theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),  
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16), 
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),   
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),   
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14),  
    strip.text.y = element_text(size = 14), 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)    
)



print(nds_combined)
```

```{r}
#ggsave("nds_combined.png", nds_combined, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 1000)
```


```{r}
# pull coefficients and sd from model
nds_coef_b2 <- coef(nds_model_brms)

# group-level sd
nds_sd_b2 <- nds_coef_b2$group[, 2, ]

# dataframe with sd
nds_total_effects_b2 <- data.frame(
  group = 1:12,
  beta_0 = nds_coef_b2$group[, 1, 1],
  beta_N = nds_coef_b2$group[, 1, 2],
  beta_P = nds_coef_b2$group[, 1, 3],
  beta_NP = nds_coef_b2$group[, 1, 4],
  beta_0_sd = nds_sd_b2[, 1],  # standard deviation
  beta_N_sd = nds_sd_b2[, 2],
  beta_P_sd = nds_sd_b2[, 3],
  beta_NP_sd = nds_sd_b2[, 4]
)

# sum total effects -> beta_sum
nds_total_effects_b2$beta_sum <- nds_total_effects_b2$beta_N + nds_total_effects_b2$beta_P + nds_total_effects_b2$beta_NP

# variance sum rule
nds_total_effects_b2$beta_sum_sd <- with(nds_total_effects_b2, sqrt(beta_N_sd^2 + beta_P_sd^2 + beta_NP_sd^2))

# merge
nds_bparams2 <- data.frame(
  N = rep(c(0, 1, 0, 1), 12),
  P = rep(c(0, 0, 1, 1), 12),
  group = as.factor(rep(1:12, each = 4))
)

nds_total_effects_b2$group <- as.factor(nds_total_effects_b2$group)

nds_bparams2 <- left_join(nds_bparams2, nds_total_effects_b2, by = "group")

# predicted values with se
nds_bparams2$pred <- with(nds_bparams2, beta_0 + beta_N * N + beta_P * P + beta_NP * N * P)
nds_bparams2$pred_sd <- with(nds_bparams2,
  sqrt(beta_0_sd^2 + (N * beta_N_sd)^2 + (P * beta_P_sd)^2 + (N * P * beta_NP_sd)^2)
)

```

## Algal biomass and parameter estimate dataframe

```{r}
#upload afdm and algal cover
afdm_data <- read.csv("AFDM.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",")

algae_data <- read.csv("Algal_cover.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",")

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Calculate average cover, standard deviation, n, and biomass with SE
algae_avg <- algae_data %>%
  group_by(Site, Deployment, group) %>% 
  summarise(
    avg_cover = mean(Perc_Cover, na.rm = TRUE),
    algae_sd = sd(Perc_Cover, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    afdm = 1.6,  #average afdm value for all deployments and sites

    biomass = afdm * avg_cover * 100, #afdm * percent cover = g/cm2
    se_cover = algae_sd / sqrt(n),
    se_biomass = afdm * se_cover * 100
  )

```

```{r}
#join the dataframes by 'group'

nds_total_effects_b2$group <- as.factor(nds_total_effects_b2$group)
algae_avg$group <- as.factor(algae_avg$group)

bioassay <- left_join(nds_total_effects_b2, algae_avg, by = "group")

# View the result
print(bioassay)
```

## surface water chemistry and algal cover (%)

```{r}
#load data
ucfr <- read.csv("ucfr_chemistry.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",")
```

```{r}
ucfr <- ucfr %>%
  mutate(across(c(NO3_µgL, SRP_µgL, NH3_µgL, TP_µgL, TN_µgL), 
                ~ as.numeric(ifelse(grepl("^<", .), NA, .))))

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

ucfr_processed <- ucfr %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) %>%
  mutate(Deployment = case_when(
    Date %in% as.Date(c("2024-06-10", "2024-06-27", "2024-07-17")) ~ 1,  # Deployment 1 for these dates
    Date %in% as.Date(c("2024-07-31", "2024-08-13")) ~ 2,  # Deployment 2 for these dates
    Date %in% as.Date(c("2024-08-31", "2024-09-13")) ~ 3,  # Deployment 3 for these dates
    TRUE ~ NA_real_  
  )) %>%
  mutate(Site = as.factor(Site)) %>%  # Ensure site is a factor
  filter(
    Site != "BLANK",  # exclude BLANK rows
    #!is.na(Date)      # remove rows with missing dates
  ) %>%
  group_by(Site, Deployment) %>%
  summarise(
    # Calculate means for all relevant variables
    NO3_mean = mean(NO3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    NO3_sd = sd(NO3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    SRP_mean = mean(SRP_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    SRP_sd = sd(SRP_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    NH3_mean = mean(NH3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    NH3_sd = sd(NH3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    TP_mean = mean(TP_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    TN_mean = mean(TN_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    # DIN_SRP_mean = mean(DIN_SRP, na.rm = TRUE),
    #num_dates = n_distinct(Date),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )


#convert µg/L to moles
ucfr_processed$NO3_moles <- ucfr_processed$NO3_mean /14.067
ucfr_processed$NH3_moles <- ucfr_processed$NH3_mean /14.067
ucfr_processed$SRP_moles <- ucfr_processed$SRP_mean /30.973762
ucfr_processed$TN_mole <- ucfr_processed$TN_mean /14.067
ucfr_processed$TP_mole <- ucfr_processed$TP_mean /30.973762

ucfr_processed$DIN_moles<- ucfr_processed$NO3_moles+ucfr_processed$NH3_moles
  
ucfr_processed$DIN_SRP_mole <- ucfr_processed$DIN_moles/ucfr_processed$SRP_moles

ucfr_processed$TN_TP_mole <- ucfr_processed$TN_mole / ucfr_processed$TP_mole

ucfr_processed$DIN_TP_mole <- ucfr_processed$DIN_moles/ucfr_processed$TP_mole

#how does it look?
#print(ucfr_processed)

```

```{r}
# Create the group column
ucfr_processed <- ucfr_processed %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(
    Site == 1 & Deployment == 1 ~ 1,
    Site == 2 & Deployment == 1 ~ 2,
    Site == 3 & Deployment == 1 ~ 3,
    Site == 4 & Deployment == 1 ~ 4,
    Site == 1 & Deployment == 2 ~ 5,
    Site == 2 & Deployment == 2 ~ 6,
    Site == 3 & Deployment == 2 ~ 7,
    Site == 4 & Deployment == 2 ~ 8,
    Site == 1 & Deployment == 3 ~ 9,
    Site == 2 & Deployment == 3 ~ 10,
    Site == 3 & Deployment == 3 ~ 11,
    Site == 4 & Deployment == 3 ~ 12,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_  # Assign NA if Site or Deployment is missing
  ))

ucfr_processed <- ucfr_processed %>%
  mutate(TN_TP = ifelse(!is.na(TN_mean) & !is.na(TP_mean) & TP_mean > 0, TN_mean / TP_mean, NA))

```

```{r}
# Ensure Site and Deployment are the same type in both dataframes
bioassay <- bioassay %>%
  mutate(
    Site = as.integer(Site),
    Deployment = as.integer(Deployment),
    group = as.factor(group)  # Ensure 'group' is a factor
  )

ucfr_processed <- ucfr_processed %>%
  mutate(
    Site = as.integer(Site),
    Deployment = as.integer(Deployment),
    group = as.factor(group)  # Ensure 'group' is a factor
  )

# Perform the join
bioassay <- left_join(bioassay, ucfr_processed, by = c("group", "Site", "Deployment"))
```

```{r}
# clean data
bioassay_clean <- bioassay %>%
  filter(!is.na(TN_TP_mole), !is.na(DIN_SRP_mole), !is.na(beta_P), !is.na(beta_N), !is.na(beta_NP),
         !is.infinite(TN_TP_mole), !is.infinite(DIN_SRP_mole))

print(bioassay)
```

```{r}
# Compute Pearson correlation coefficients
r1 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TN_TP_mole, bioassay_clean$beta_P, use = "complete.obs")
r2 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TN_TP_mole, bioassay_clean$beta_N, use = "complete.obs")
r3 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TN_TP_mole, bioassay_clean$beta_NP, use = "complete.obs")
r4 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TN_TP_mole, bioassay_clean$beta_sum, use = "complete.obs")
r5 <- cor(bioassay_clean$DIN_SRP_mole, bioassay_clean$beta_P, use = "complete.obs")
r6 <- cor(bioassay_clean$DIN_SRP_mole, bioassay_clean$beta_N, use = "complete.obs")
r7 <- cor(bioassay_clean$DIN_SRP_mole, bioassay_clean$beta_NP, use = "complete.obs")
r8 <- cor(bioassay_clean$DIN_SRP_mole, bioassay_clean$beta_sum, use = "complete.obs")

# Plot 1: TN:TP vs beta_P
plot1_1 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TN_TP_mole, beta_P)) +
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_P - beta_P_sd, ymax = beta_P + beta_P_sd), width = 0.02, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "", y = expression(beta^P)) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TN_TP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_P, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r1, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0)+
           geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") + 
           geom_vline(xintercept = 17, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 2: TN:TP vs beta_N
plot2_1 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TN_TP_mole, beta_N)) +
  geom_point(color = "red3") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_N - beta_N_sd, ymax = beta_N + beta_N_sd), width = 0.02, color = "red3") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "", y = expression(beta^N)) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TN_TP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_P, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r2, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0)+
           geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") + 
           geom_vline(xintercept = 17, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 3: TN:TP vs beta_NP
plot3_1 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TN_TP_mole, beta_NP)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkorchid4") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_NP - beta_NP_sd, ymax = beta_NP + beta_NP_sd), width = 0.02, color = "darkorchid4") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "", y = expression(beta^NP)) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
   annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TN_TP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_P, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r3, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0)+
           geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") + 
           geom_vline(xintercept = 17, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 4: TN:TP vs beta_sum
plot4_1 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TN_TP_mole, beta_sum)) +
  geom_point(color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_sum - beta_sum_sd, ymax = beta_sum + beta_sum_sd), width = 0.02, color = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "TN:TP", y = expression(beta^sum)) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TN_TP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_P, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r4, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0)+
           geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") + 
           geom_vline(xintercept = 17, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")
# Plot 5: DIN:SRP vs beta_P
plot5_1 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(DIN_SRP_mole, beta_P)) +
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_P - beta_P_sd, ymax = beta_P + beta_P_sd), width = 0.1, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$DIN_SRP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_P, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r5, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 17, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 6: DIN:SRP vs beta_N
plot6_1 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(DIN_SRP_mole, beta_N)) +
  geom_point(color = "red3") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_N - beta_N_sd, ymax = beta_N + beta_N_sd), width = 0.1, color = "red3") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$DIN_SRP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_N, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r6, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 17, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 7: DIN:SRP vs beta_NP
plot7_1 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(DIN_SRP_mole, beta_NP)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkorchid4") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_NP - beta_NP_sd, ymax = beta_NP + beta_NP_sd), width = 0.1, color = "darkorchid4") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$DIN_SRP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_NP, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r7, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 17, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 8: DIN:SRP vs beta_sum
plot8_1 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(DIN_SRP_mole, beta_sum)) +
  geom_point(color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_sum - beta_sum_sd, ymax = beta_sum + beta_sum_sd), width = 0.1, color = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "DIN:SRP", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$DIN_SRP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_sum, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r8, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 17, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")


# Combine plots
beta_params_plot2 <- (plot1_1 / plot2_1 / plot3_1 / plot4_1) | (plot5_1 / plot6_1 / plot7_1 / plot8_1)

# Display the plot
beta_params_plot2

```


```{r}
#ggsave("beta_params_plot4.png", beta_params_plot4, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 1000)
```

## Plotting Algae and Nutrient Ratios

```{r}
r9 <- cor(bioassay$TN_TP_mole, bioassay$biomass, use = "complete.obs")
r10 <- cor(bioassay$DIN_SRP_mole, bioassay$biomass, use = "complete.obs")

plot9 <- ggplot(bioassay, aes(TN_TP_mole, biomass)) +
  geom_point(color = "forestgreen") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = biomass - se_biomass, ymax = biomass + se_biomass),
                width = 0, color = "forestgreen") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "TN:TP", y = expression(Algal~Biomass~(g~AFDM/m^2))) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay$TN_TP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = max(bioassay$biomass, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r9, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 35, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot DIN:SRP vs biomass with SE bars
plot10 <- ggplot(bioassay, aes(DIN_SRP_mole, biomass)) +
  geom_point(color = "forestgreen") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = biomass - se_biomass, ymax = biomass + se_biomass),
                width = 0, color = "forestgreen") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "DIN:SRP", y = expression(Algal~Biomass~(g~AFDM/m^2))) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay$DIN_SRP_mole, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = max(bioassay$biomass, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r10, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 35, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")


```

```{r}
# Combine the plots
algal_plot <- (plot9) | (plot10)
print(algal_plot)
```


```{r}
# Specify png device explicitly to avoid the ragg default
#ggsave("algal_plot.png", algal_plot, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 1000)
```

## Supplemental Index

```{r}
ucfr_nutrient <- ucfr %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date), # Ensure Date is in Date format
         Site = as.factor(Site)) %>% # Ensure Site is a factor
  filter(
    Site != "BLANK" # Exclude BLANK rows
  ) %>%
  group_by(Site, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    # Nitrate (NO3)
    NO3_mean = mean(NO3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    NO3_sd = sd(NO3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Soluble Reactive Phosphorus (SRP)
    SRP_mean = mean(SRP_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    SRP_sd = sd(SRP_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Ammonia (NH3)
    NH3_mean = mean(NH3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    NH3_sd = sd(NH3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Total Phosphorus (TP)
    TP_mean = mean(TP_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    TP_sd = sd(TP_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Total Nitrogen (TN)
    TN_mean = mean(TN_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    TN_sd = sd(TN_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),
    # DIN (Dissolved Inorganic Nitrogen)
    DIN_mean = mean(NO3_µgL + NH3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE),  # Mean of summed values
    DIN_sd = sd(NO3_µgL + NH3_µgL, na.rm = TRUE) 
  )


# Ensure Site is a factor
ucfr_nutrient <- ucfr_nutrient %>%
  mutate(Site = as.factor(Site))
```

## Nutrient concentrations over time
### Nitrate trends for all sites

```{r}
# Define shaded date ranges
shaded_periods <- data.frame(
  xmin = as.Date(c("2024-06-26", "2024-07-24", "2024-08-21")),
  xmax = as.Date(c("2024-07-14", "2024-08-11", "2024-09-08"))
)

# customize site colors (if needed)
site_colors <- c(
  "1" = "black",
  "2" = "black",  
  "3" = "black",  
  "4" = "black" 
)

# Create the plot
no3_plot <- ggplot(ucfr_nutrient, aes(x = Date, y = NO3_mean, 
                                      shape = Site, 
                                      linetype = Site,
                                      color = Site)) +
  geom_rect(data = shaded_periods, 
            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf), 
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fill = "lightgray", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(size = 0.75) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(
    ymin = pmax(NO3_mean - NO3_sd, 0),
    ymax = NO3_mean + NO3_sd
  ), width = 0.2) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("1" = 16, "2" = 1, "3" = 15, "4" = 0)) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("1" = "solid", "2" = "dashed", "3" = "solid", "4" = "dashed")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 300), breaks = seq(0, 300, 100)) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = expression(NO[3]^"-" ~ "(µg N/L)"),
    shape = "Site",
    linetype = "Site",
    color = "Site"
  )



# Print the plot
print(no3_plot)

```

```{r}
#ggsave("nitrate_plot.png", no3_plot, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 1000)
```

### SRP trends for all sites

```{r}
# Filter out invalid rows for SRP_mean
ucfr_nutrient <- ucfr_nutrient %>%
  filter(!is.na(SRP_mean) & SRP_mean > 0)

# Define custom site colors again (if not already defined)
site_colors <- c(
  "1" = "black",
  "2" = "black",  
  "3" = "black",  
  "4" = "black" 
)

# Replot with the filtered dataset
srp_plot <- ggplot(ucfr_nutrient, aes(x = Date, y = SRP_mean, 
                                      shape = Site, 
                                      linetype = Site,
                                      color = Site)) +
  geom_rect(data = shaded_periods, 
            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf), 
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fill = "lightgray", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(size = 0.75) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(
    ymin = pmax(SRP_mean - SRP_sd, 0),
    ymax = SRP_mean + SRP_sd
  ), width = 0.2) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("1" = 16, "2" = 1, "3" = 15, "4" = 0)) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("1" = "solid", "2" = "dashed", "3" = "solid", "4" = "dashed")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 15), breaks = seq(0, 15, 5)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "SRP (µg/L)",
    shape = "Site",
    linetype = "Site",
    color = "Site"
  )

print(srp_plot)

```

```{r}
#ggsave("srp_plot.png", srp_plot, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 1000)
```

### NH3 trends for all sites

```{r}
# Define custom site colors again (if not already defined)
site_colors <- c(
  "1" = "black",
  "2" = "black",  
  "3" = "black",  
  "4" = "black" 
)


# Create the updated NH3 plot
nh3_plot <- ggplot(ucfr_nutrient, aes(x = Date, y = NH3_mean, 
                                      shape = Site, 
                                      linetype = Site,
                                      color = Site)) +
  geom_rect(data = shaded_periods, 
            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf), 
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fill = "lightgray", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(size = 0.75) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(
    ymin = pmax(NH3_mean - NH3_sd, 0),
    ymax = NH3_mean + NH3_sd
  ), width = 0.2) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("1" = 16, "2" = 1, "3" = 15, "4" = 0)) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("1" = "solid", "2" = "dashed", "3" = "solid", "4" = "dashed")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, NA),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6)
  ) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = expression(NH[4]^"+" ~ "(µg N/L)"),
    shape = "Site",
    linetype = "Site",
    color = "Site"
  )

print(nh3_plot)

```

```{r}
#ggsave("nh3_plot.png", nh3_plot, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 1000)

```

```{r}

# modify plots for identical axes 
no3_plot_modified <- no3_plot +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

nh3_plot_modified <- nh3_plot +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

srp_plot_modified <- srp_plot +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )


# combine the plots
combined_plot <- no3_plot_modified / nh3_plot_modified / srp_plot_modified  +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") & # Collect all legends
  theme(legend.position = "right")  # Place the legend on the right

# print the combined plot
print(combined_plot)
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Pearson correlation coefficient for b_params and TN
r11 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TN_mean, bioassay_clean$beta_P, use = "complete.obs")
r12 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TN_mean, bioassay_clean$beta_N, use = "complete.obs")
r13 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TN_mean, bioassay_clean$beta_NP, use = "complete.obs")
r14 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TN_mean, bioassay_clean$beta_sum, use = "complete.obs")


# Pearson correlation coefficient for b_params and TP
r15 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TP_mean, bioassay_clean$beta_P, use = "complete.obs")
r16 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TP_mean, bioassay_clean$beta_N, use = "complete.obs")
r17 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TP_mean, bioassay_clean$beta_NP, use = "complete.obs")
r18 <- cor(bioassay_clean$TP_mean, bioassay_clean$beta_sum, use = "complete.obs")

# Plot 11: TN vs beta_P
plot11 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TN_mean, beta_P)) +
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_P - beta_P_sd, ymax = beta_P + beta_P_sd), width = 0.02, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "", y = expression(beta^P)) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16), axis.title = element_text(size = 18)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TN_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_P, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r11, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 12: TN vs beta_N
plot12 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TN_mean, beta_N)) +
  geom_point(color = "red3") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_N - beta_N_sd, ymax = beta_N + beta_N_sd), width = 0.02, color = "red3") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "", y = expression(beta^N)) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16), axis.title = element_text(size = 18)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TN_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_N, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r12, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 13: TN vs beta_NP
plot13 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TN_mean, beta_NP)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkorchid4") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_NP - beta_NP_sd, ymax = beta_NP + beta_NP_sd), width = 0.02, color = "darkorchid4") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "TN (µg/L)", y = expression(beta^NP)) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16), axis.title = element_text(size = 18)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TN_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_NP, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r13, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")


# Plot 14: TN vs beta_sum
plot14 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TN_mean, beta_sum)) +
  geom_point(color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_sum - beta_sum_sd, ymax = beta_sum + beta_sum_sd), width = 0.02, color = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "", y = expression(beta^sum)) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16), axis.title = element_text(size = 18)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TN_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_sum, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r14, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")


# Plot 15: TP vs beta_P
plot15 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TP_mean, beta_P)) +
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_P - beta_P_sd, ymax = beta_P + beta_P_sd), width = 0.1, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16), axis.title = element_text(size = 18)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TP_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_P, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r15, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 16: TP vs beta_N
plot16 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TP_mean, beta_N)) +
  geom_point(color = "red3") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_N - beta_N_sd, ymax = beta_N + beta_N_sd), width = 0.1, color = "red3") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16), axis.title = element_text(size = 18)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TP_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_N, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r16, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

# Plot 17: TP vs beta_NP
plot17 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TP_mean, beta_NP)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkorchid4") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_NP - beta_NP_sd, ymax = beta_NP + beta_NP_sd), width = 0.1, color = "darkorchid4") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "TP (µg/L)", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16), axis.title = element_text(size = 18)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TP_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_NP, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r17, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")


# Plot 18: TP vs beta_sum
plot18 <- ggplot(bioassay_clean, aes(TP_mean, beta_sum)) +
  geom_point(color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = beta_sum - beta_sum_sd, ymax = beta_sum + beta_sum_sd), width = 0.02, color = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16), axis.title = element_text(size = 18)) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay_clean$TP_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = min(bioassay_clean$beta_sum, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r14, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 0) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")



# Combine plots
beta_params_plot5 <- (plot14 / plot11 / plot12 / plot13) | (plot18 / plot15 / plot16 / plot17)

# Display the plot
beta_params_plot5

```

```{r}
#ggsave("beta_params_5.png", beta_params_plot5, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 1000)
```

```{r}
# Pearson correlation coefficient for biomass and TN
r19 <- cor(bioassay$TN_mean, bioassay$biomass, use = "complete.obs")

# Pearson correlation coefficient for biomass and TP
r20 <- cor(bioassay$TP_mean, bioassay$biomass, use = "complete.obs")
```

```{r}
#TN_mean and biomass
plot19 <- ggplot(bioassay, aes(TN_mean, biomass)) +
  geom_point(color = "forestgreen") +  
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "TN (µg/L)", y = expression(Algal~Biomass~(g~AFDM/m^2))) +  
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = biomass - se_biomass, ymax = biomass + se_biomass),
                width = 0, color = "forestgreen") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),  # Increase x-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),  # Increase y-axis title size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),  # Increase y-axis tick label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12)   # Adjust x-axis tick label size
  ) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay$TN_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = max(bioassay$biomass, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r19, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 35, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

#TP mean and biomass
plot20 <- ggplot(bioassay, aes(TP_mean, biomass)) +
  geom_point(color = "forestgreen") +  
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = biomass - se_biomass, ymax = biomass + se_biomass),
                width = 0, color = "forestgreen") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "TP (µg/L)", y = expression(Algal~Biomass~(g~AFDM/m^2))) +  
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),  # Increase x-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),  # Increase y-axis title size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),  # Increase y-axis tick label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12)   # Adjust x-axis tick label size
  ) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(bioassay$TP_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 
           y = max(bioassay$biomass, na.rm = TRUE), 
           label = paste0("r = ", round(r20, 2)), 
           size = 6, hjust = 1, vjust = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 35, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")

```

```{r}
algal_plot2 <- (plot19) | (plot20)
print(algal_plot2)

```

```{r}
# Save the combined plot if needed
#ggsave("algal_plot2.png", algal_plot2, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 1000)
```


## Discharge for the CFR

```{r}

# --- Config ---
# USGS site numbers (fixed mapping to Site 1–4)
deerlodge_site <- "12324200"  # Site 1
garrison_site  <- "12324400"  # Site 2
goldcreek_site <- "12324680"  # Site 3
beargulch_site <- "12331800"  # Site 4

# Parameter/discharge codes
pCode    <- "00060"   # Discharge
statCode <- "00003"   # Daily mean

# Toggle unit conversion: TRUE = m^3/s, FALSE = cfs
convert_to_cms <- TRUE
cfs_to_cms     <- 1 / 35.3147

# Plot window
start_date <- ymd("2024-06-10")
end_date   <- ymd("2024-09-13")

# Shaded deployment periods
shaded_periods <- data.frame(
  xmin  = as.Date(c("2024-06-26", "2024-07-24", "2024-08-21")),
  xmax  = as.Date(c("2024-07-14", "2024-08-11", "2024-09-08")),
  label = c("D1", "D2", "D3")
) |>
  mutate(mid = xmin + (xmax - xmin) / 2)

# Color palette keyed to Site = "1"–"4"
palette4 <- c(
  "1" = "#F6a97a",
  "2" = "#F66D7A",  
  "3" = "#D44292",  
  "4" = "#952EA0"   
)

  
# --- Data pull ---
discharge_deerlodge <- readNWISdv(siteNumbers = deerlodge_site, parameterCd = pCode, statCd = statCode)
discharge_garrison  <- readNWISdv(siteNumbers = garrison_site,  parameterCd = pCode, statCd = statCode)
discharge_goldcreek <- readNWISdv(siteNumbers = goldcreek_site, parameterCd = pCode, statCd = statCode)
discharge_beargulch <- readNWISdv(siteNumbers = beargulch_site, parameterCd = pCode, statCd = statCode)

# --- Combine & prepare ---
clark_discharge <- bind_rows(
  discharge_deerlodge,
  discharge_garrison,
  discharge_goldcreek,
  discharge_beargulch
) |>
  rename(daily_Q_cfs = X_00060_00003) |>
  mutate(
    # Map site_no -> Site factor (1–4) with stable ordering
    site = factor(
      as.numeric(factor(site_no,
                        levels = c(deerlodge_site, garrison_site, goldcreek_site, beargulch_site))),
      levels = 1:4,
      labels = c("1", "2", "3", "4")
    ),
    Date = as.Date(Date)
  ) |>
  filter(Date >= start_date, Date <= end_date) |>
  mutate(
    discharge_plot = if (convert_to_cms) daily_Q_cfs * cfs_to_cms else daily_Q_cfs
  )

# For placing deployment labels near the top of the panel
y_top <- max(clark_discharge$discharge_plot, na.rm = TRUE)

# --- Plot ---
q_plot <- ggplot(clark_discharge, aes(x = Date, y = discharge_plot)) +
  # Shaded deployments
  geom_rect(
    data = shaded_periods,
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = "grey60", alpha = 0.15, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # Lines
  geom_line(aes(color = site), linewidth = 0.7) +
  # Deployment labels
  geom_text(
    data = shaded_periods,
    aes(x = mid, y = 0.98 * y_top, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette4, name = "Site") +
  ylab(if (convert_to_cms) expression("Discharge (" * m^3 * "/s)") else "Discharge (cfs)") +
  xlab(NULL) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",         # move to right
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key.height = unit(1.1, "lines")  # spacing between items
  )

print(q_plot)



#ggsave("clark_fork_discharge2_2024.png", q_plot, width = 5, height = 3.5, dpi = 1000)

```


### Posterior predictive checks:

```{r}
library(bayesplot)
library(brms)


pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "dens_overlay")
pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "error_binned")
pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "ecdf_overlay")
pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "hist")    
pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "boxplot")     
pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "scatter")       


pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "error_scatter_avg")  
pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "error_hist")       


pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "stat_2d")   
pp_check(nds_model_brms, type = "intervals")  


```

```{r}

# Define the model
model <- nds_model_brms  # Replace with your actual model object

# Define the directory to save plots
output_dir <- "ppc_plots/"
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

# List of posterior predictive check types
ppc_types <- c("dens_overlay", "error_binned", "ecdf_overlay", "hist", "boxplot", 
               "scatter", "error_scatter_avg", "error_hist", "stat_2d", "intervals")

# Loop through each type and save the plot
for (type in ppc_types) {
  p <- pp_check(model, type = type)
  ggsave(filename = paste0(output_dir, "ppc_", type, ".png"), plot = p, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
}


```
